summary: The post is a satirical projection of an NFT‑driven future, extrapolating today’s crypto pitches to their logical extreme. It argues that once everything becomes tokenized, every human activity turns into a tradable financial instrument with embedded revenue sharing. The narrative shows how this accelerates marketization, amplifies inequality, and makes speculation central to culture, services, and even personal identity. It portrays governance hollowed out by smart contracts, with essential services priced dynamically and access stratified by wealth. The conclusion is a bitterly ironic “bright future” that reads as a warning about unchecked financialization.
key_points: NFTs’ core properties (global tradability, strong ownership claims, automated revenue sharing) enable pervasive marketization.
Tokenization spreads from art into education, housing, tickets, identity, and healthcare, converting life outcomes into securities.
Dynamic pricing and resale markets dominate access, especially in culture and public services, entrenching inequality.
Smart-contract governance replaces traditional institutions, eroding taxation and public accountability.
Speculation extends to tragedies and medical outcomes, highlighting ethical degradation under total financialization.
money_quotes: Everything turned into an NFT and because everything is now trade-able, there is a market for everything.
This very advanced form of capitalism has also created many novel financial products that were previously unheard of.
Since artists receive a cut of any future ticket sale, the market is now completely dominated by the reselling process and dynamic pricing.
Taxation has almost entirely disappeared since governments were completely unable to keep up with the ever growing world of smart contracts and blockchain businesses.
A less well off district is paying a premium over a safe neighborhood for police and fire fighting services.
What is on the blockchain is what matters.
Traders can now run trading algorithms to determine the likelihood of death and gamble on the outcome of that operation for a chance of future earnings of the person.
The future is bright and full of potential.
key_insight: By tokenizing everything, the NFT dream becomes a dystopia where all human experiences are priced, traded, and exploited.
